idea-plugin.name: Fish Toucher
idea-plugin.description:
A slacking-off plugin for IntelliJ IDEA — read novels or browse hot search trends while pretending to work.

Novel Reading Mode
  • Stealth Mode (Status Bar): One line of text in the status bar — looks like a normal status message. Click to advance.
  • Normal Mode (Tool Window): Multi-line display disguised as build log output, with page navigation and progress slider.
  • Both modes share unified reading progress
  • Auto charset detection (UTF-8 / GBK / UTF-16)
  • Boss key to instantly hide all content
  • Customizable keyboard shortcuts and font settings
Hot Search Carousel Mode
  • Real-time hot search trends displayed in both tool window and status bar
  • Multiple sources: Baidu, Toutiao, Zhihu, Douyin, Kuaishou — switchable in settings
  • Click any hot search title to open in browser
  • Auto-refreshing data with carousel rotation
Settings: Settings → Tools → Fish Toucher

一款适用于 IntelliJ IDEA 的摸鱼插件 — 在假装工作的同时看小说或浏览热搜。

小说阅读模式
  • 隐秘模式（状态栏）：在状态栏显示一行文本，外观与普通状态信息无异，点击翻页
  • 普通模式（工具窗口）：多行显示，伪装成构建日志，支持翻页和进度滑块
  • 两种模式共用统一阅读进度
  • 自动识别文件编码（UTF-8 / GBK / UTF-16）
  • 老板键一键隐藏所有阅读内容
  • 可自定义快捷键和字体设置
热搜轮播模式
  • 实时热搜榜单，同时显示在工具窗口和状态栏
  • 多热搜源支持：百度、今日头条、知乎、抖音、快手，可在设置中切换
  • 点击热搜标题直接在浏览器中打开
  • 自动刷新数据，轮播滚动显示
设置路径： Settings → Tools → Fish Toucher
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.1.0
  • New: Configurable carousel interval and data refresh interval for hot search
    新增：热搜轮播间隔和数据刷新间隔可自定义
  • Improved: Tool window default position changed to right side
    优化：工具窗口默认位置改为右侧
2.0.1
  • New: Switch hot search source directly in tool window bottom bar
    新增：工具窗口底部可直接切换热搜来源
  • Fixed: Hot search list not displaying in tool window
    修复：工具窗口热搜列表不显示的问题
2.0.0
  • New: Hot Search Carousel mode — browse real-time hot search trends in the IDE
    新增：热搜轮播模式 — 在 IDE 中浏览实时热搜榜单
  • New: Multiple hot search sources — Baidu, Toutiao, Zhihu, switchable in settings
    新增：多热搜源支持 — 百度、今日头条、知乎，可在设置中切换
  • New: Click hot search titles to open in browser
    新增：点击热搜标题可在浏览器中打开
  • New: Hot search displayed in both tool window and status bar with carousel rotation
    新增：热搜同时显示在工具窗口和状态栏，自动轮播
  • Improved: New cute fish plugin icon
    优化：全新萌鱼插件图标
1.4.1
  • Changed: Stealth mode and Normal mode now share unified reading progress
    变更：隐秘模式与普通模式共用统一阅读进度
  • Improved: Existing dual-progress data automatically migrated to unified progress (keeps the further position)
    优化：已有的双进度数据自动迁移为统一进度（保留较远的阅读位置）
1.4.0
  • New: Two independent reading modes — Stealth Mode (status bar) and Normal Mode (tool window)
    新增：两种独立阅读模式 — 隐秘模式（状态栏）和普通模式（工具窗口）
  • New: Each mode has its own reading progress, chars per line, and lines per page settings
    新增：每种模式拥有独立的阅读进度、每行字数、每页行数配置
  • Improved: New bright orange fish into icon for better visibility
    优化：图标加入一条橙红色小鱼

action.description: Open a local novel text file
